package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for bindjson_into_map_any_hot_endpoint: Gin handlers that bind JSON into map[string]any or map[string]interface{} on hot request paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule307NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule307NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule307NegativeRecord) (Rule307NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario307Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule307NegativeService, input Rule307NegativeRecord) (Rule307NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule307NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
